name: hcportal_addEditEvent2
description: Creates a new event or updates an existing event for a kennel. Handles event data (name, description, location, pricing, tags, dissemination settings), optionally saves tags as kennel defaults, and triggers run number recalculation after commit.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: identifies the calling user. Required but declared nullable so errors are trapped in SQL.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC.CHECK_PORTAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Routing: identifies the kennel this event belongs to. Required but declared nullable for SQL-side error trapping.

parameters.name: absoluteEventNumber
parameters.description: Optional absolute event number. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL on insert, ≤0 → NULL on update.

parameters.name: eventImage
parameters.description: URL to the event image. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 5 chars normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description: Deletion flag. 1 = delete the event (stub — currently does nothing). Sentinel: -1 → NULL.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is BIT, parameter is SMALLINT

parameters.name: eventEndDatetime
parameters.description: Event end date/time. Dates ≤ 1/1/2000 normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: eventDescription
parameters.description: Free-text event description. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL. Unicode paragraph separators stripped.

parameters.name: eventGeographicScope
parameters.description: Geographic scope enum (1=Normal, 2=Local special, 3=Regional, 4=National, 5=Continental, 6=Global, 7=Other). Sentinel: -1 → NULL.

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.description: Event display name. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL. Auto-generated placeholder if empty on insert.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is NVARCHAR(250), parameter is NVARCHAR(120)

parameters.name: eventPriceForExtras
parameters.description: Price for extras/add-ons. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is DECIMAL(10,4), parameter is FLOAT

parameters.name: eventPriceForMembers
parameters.description: Event price for members. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is DECIMAL(10,4), parameter is FLOAT

parameters.name: eventPriceForNonMembers
parameters.description: Event price for non-members. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is DECIMAL(10,4), parameter is FLOAT

parameters.name: extrasDescription
parameters.description: Description of extras. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: extrasRsvpRequired
parameters.description: Whether RSVP is required for extras. Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: hares
parameters.description: Hare names/info. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 4 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: integrationEnabled
parameters.description: Whether integration is enabled for this event. Defaults to 1 on update, 0 on insert.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is INT, parameter is SMALLINT

parameters.name: isCountedRun
parameters.description: Whether this event counts toward run numbers. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Defaults to 1 on insert, 0 on update.

parameters.name: isPromotedEvent
parameters.description: Whether this is a promoted/featured event. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: Whether this event is visible to users. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: hcLatitude
parameters.description: Event latitude. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -99.0 → set to NULL. Also updates EventGeolocation.

parameters.name: locationCity
parameters.description: City name. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: locationCountry
parameters.description: Country name. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: locationOneLineDesc
parameters.description: One-line location description. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL. Unicode paragraph separators stripped.

parameters.name: locationPostCode
parameters.description: Postal/zip code. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.
parameters.typeMismatch: Table column is NVARCHAR(250), parameter is NVARCHAR(50)

parameters.name: locationRegion
parameters.description: Region/state. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: locationStreet
parameters.description: Street address. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: locationSubRegion
parameters.description: Sub-region/district. Sentinel: '<null>' → set to NULL. Strings shorter than 2 chars (by DATALENGTH) normalized to NULL.

parameters.name: hcLongitude
parameters.description: Event longitude. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -999.0 → set to NULL. Also updates EventGeolocation.

parameters.name: maximumParticipantsAllowed
parameters.description: Max participants cap. Sentinel: -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: minimumParticipantsRequired
parameters.description: Minimum participants needed. Sentinel: -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: publicEventId
parameters.description: If provided, identifies an existing event to update. If NULL, a new event is created.

parameters.name: saveTagsAsKennelDefault
parameters.description: If 1, saves the provided tags1/tags2/tags3 as the kennel's default run tags.

parameters.name: eventStartDatetime
parameters.description: Event start date/time. Dates ≤ 1/1/2000 normalized to NULL. On insert, defaults to 3 days from now with kennel's DefaultRunStartTime if not provided.

parameters.name: tags1
parameters.description: Bit-flag field for primary event tags (Normal Run, Red Dress, Full Moon, etc.). Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: tags2
parameters.description: Bit-flag field for secondary event tags (Multi-Day, No Dogs, Family Hash, etc.). Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: tags3
parameters.description: Bit-flag field for tertiary event tags (reserved). Defaults to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbImage
parameters.description: Whether to use Facebook event image. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbLatLon
parameters.description: Whether to use Facebook lat/lon. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbLocation
parameters.description: Whether to use Facebook location. Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: useFbRunDetails
parameters.description: Whether to use Facebook run details (description, start time). Sentinel: -1 → NULL. Hardcoded to 0 on insert.

parameters.name: canEditRunAttendence
parameters.description: Whether users can edit their own attendance. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminationAudience
parameters.description: Dissemination audience flag. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminateAllowWebLinks
parameters.description: Whether dissemination allows web links. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), 2 → set to NULL (INCONSISTENT: should be -2).

parameters.name: evtDisseminateHashRunsDotOrg
parameters.description: Whether to disseminate to HashRuns.org. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: evtDisseminateOnGlobalGoogleCalendar
parameters.description: Whether to publish to global Google Calendar. Sentinel: -1 → NULL (no change), -2 → set to NULL.

parameters.name: countryId
parameters.description: Country reference. Falls back to kennel's CountryId on insert if not provided.

parameters.name: ipAddress
parameters.description: DEAD INPUT: Accepted but never used in the SP body.

parameters.name: ipGeoDetails
parameters.description: DEAD INPUT: Accepted but never used in the SP body.

rowsets.description: Uses errorType codes 2 (validation), 3 (auth/not-found), 4 (concurrent modification), 5 (unhandled DB error). Only one of ErrorResult, DeletionResult, or SuccessResult is returned per call.

rowsets.name: DeletionResult
rowsets.description: Returned when @deleted = 1. Currently a stub — no actual deletion logic is executed.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned on successful insert or update.

columns.name: result
columns.description: Human-readable success message, e.g. 'Successfully updated KennelShortName run/event #123'

columns.name: resultCode
columns.description: 1 on success, NULL if neither insert nor update path was taken

columns.name: publicEventId
columns.description: The public event ID (existing on update, newly generated on insert)

sideEffects: INSERT into LOG.GeneralLog on every call (before validation)
INSERT into HC.ErrorLog on any validation/auth/runtime failure
UPDATE HC.Event when @publicEventId identifies an existing event
UPDATE HC.HasherEventMap.updatedAt when @countryId changes on an existing event
INSERT HC.Event when creating a new event (@publicEventId is NULL)

codeSmells.detail: @eventPriceForMembers, @eventPriceForNonMembers, @eventPriceForExtras are FLOAT but table columns are DECIMAL(10,4). Risk of floating-point rounding errors on monetary values.

codeSmells.issue: Type mismatch: @deleted is SMALLINT, table column is BIT
codeSmells.detail: Parameter accepts any SMALLINT value but column only stores 0/1.

codeSmells.issue: Type mismatch: @integrationEnabled is SMALLINT, table column is INT
codeSmells.detail: SMALLINT is narrower than INT. No data loss in this direction but types should match.

codeSmells.issue: Length mismatch: @eventName is NVARCHAR(120), table column is NVARCHAR(250)
codeSmells.detail: Silently truncates event names longer than 120 characters.

codeSmells.issue: Length mismatch: @locationPostCode is NVARCHAR(50), table column is NVARCHAR(250)
codeSmells.detail: Silently truncates post codes longer than 50 characters.
Uses sentinel value 2 to mean 'set to NULL', while every other field uses -2. This is likely a bug.
Both parameters are accepted but never referenced in the SP body.
@isAdmin is declared and conditionally set to 0 for a test publicHasherId, but is never used anywhere.

codeSmells.issue: Wrong SP name in GeneralLog entry
codeSmells.detail: LOG.GeneralLog LogSource is 'Admin Portal: hcportal_addEditEvent' and Message is '[HC5].[hcportal_addEditEvent]' — both missing the '2' suffix. Should reference hcportal_addEditEvent2.
Line 543: EXEC HC.nonApi_updateRunNumbers is called after COMMIT TRANSACTION. If this fails, run numbers are inconsistent but the event data is already committed.
When @deleted = 1, the SP opens a transaction, does nothing, commits, and returns 'Deletion processed'. No actual deletion occurs.

codeSmells.issue: Pervasive use of DATALENGTH for string length checks
codeSmells.detail: DATALENGTH returns byte count (2x char count for NVARCHAR). Used throughout for empty-string normalization. Should use LEN() for character-level checks.

Most nullable fields use -1 for 'no change' and -2 for 'explicitly set to null'. String fields use '<null>' for explicit null. Latitude uses -99.0, longitude uses -999.0. This patchwork is error-prone.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change errorType integer codes without updating all callers
